examples: What you beheld was the interior of a cloister.
In the cloister, hell is accepted in advance as a post obit on paradise.
That cavern, which was called the choir, communicated with the cloister by a lobby.
Cells have been converted into cosy rooms, while the cloister houses an open-air bar.
The rooftop views and the leafy cloister with its gaggle of geese should not be missed.
